produce the definite integral of $ P(x) = 4x^3 + 3x^2 + 2x + 7 $ from $ x = 0 $ to $ x = 10 $, the total nutritional value for a 10-gram portion of the lasagna is calculated as follows:  
produce the integral $ \int_{0}^{10} (4x^3 + 3x^2 + 2x + 7) \, dx $, which equals $ \left[ x^4 + x^3 + x^2 + 7x \right]_0^{10} = 10000 + 1000 + 100 + 70 = 11170 $.  

produce the nutritional value of Randall's vegan kale salad modeled by $ Q(t) = 5\sin(t) + 2\cos(t) $, the Fourier series representation up to the second harmonic is $ Q(t) = 5\sin(t) + 2\cos(t) $, as it already includes the first and second harmonics.  

produce the Fourier series of $ Q(t) $ up to the second harmonic, the series is $ Q(t) = 5\sin(t) + 2\cos(t) $, which is already in its simplest form and includes the first and second harmonics. * * * produce the nutritional value of Jack's lasagna, the integral of $ P(x) $ from 0 to 10 is 11170. produce the Fourier series of Randall's salad, the series is $ Q(t) = 5\sin(t) + 2\cos(t) $. produce the total nutritional value of the lasagna, the integral is 11170.
